title: psychotria hollandiae var. whitei
intro: Psychotria hollandiae var. whitei, also known as the white Malay tea tree, is a variety of the Psychotria hollandiae plant, which is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties, which are used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Psychotria hollandiae var. whitei include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and improve digestion, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
